ut. Exalt. Own. Saumya.
Mars. Do. Do. Own, Hara. Do.
Mercury Friend. Do. Neut. Visnu. Krura.
Jup. Own. Enemy. Enemy. Enemy. Do.
Ven, Neut. Friend. Friend. Friend. Do
Sat. Do. Enemy. Neut. Do. Saumya.
There is another point to be remembered here. You know
in the example chart Saturn is in Scorpio both in Rasi and
Navamla. This sort of identity in respect of the Sign and
Navamia is termed VargottamaiMa. Its effects are similar to
those of a planet situated in his own house. In this example
though Saturn is posited in an inimical house, yet being in
Vargottamarhsa he must yield only good results.
The calculation of the Balapinda i.e. total strength of planets
in Rupas can be done according to the principles already enun-
ciated. For the present you will just note that the Sun and

PLANETARY STRENGTH 45
other planets are considered strong when they are possessed of
6i, 6, 5, 7. 6l-, 5;}, and 5 Rupas respectively in total §a^bala.
Now see how the lord of the rising decanate is. Who is he ?
